sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἀλφαῖος

- Transliteration: alphaios

- Phonetic: al-fah'-yos

- Definition: Alphaeus = "changing"

1. The father of Levi the publican (Mk 2:14)

2. The father of James the less, so called, one of the apostles

- Origin: of hebrew origin [cf H2501]

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin (compare [H2501]); Alpheus an Israelite: - Alpheus.
